    .audio-workbench{background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(10,9,8,.24),rgba(255,255,255,.025));backdrop-filter:blur(11px);padding:24px;border-radius:26px}.audio-workbench h3{font-size:29px}.audio-workbench .transcript-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px}.audio-workbench .transcript-grid textarea{height:155px;background:rgba(5,5,4,.16);border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-line) 72%,transparent)}
    @media(max-width:1100px){.player-page.audio-mode .player-main{grid-template-columns:minmax(280px,.8fr) minmax(330px,1.2fr)}.player-page.audio-mode .player-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr}.player-page.audio-mode .player-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
    @media(max-width:760px){.player-page.audio-mode .player-main{display:block}.player-page.audio-mode .stage{min-height:430px}.player-page.audio-mode #audioWorkbench{margin-top:13px}.audio-workbench .transcript-grid textarea{height:125px}}

    /* real learning records */
    .progress-page{padding:clamp(28px,3.5vw,58px)}.record-head{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;gap:30px}.record-head .page-copy{max-width:630px}.record-range-label{padding:9px 13px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--scene-line);color:#d7cfc3;font:italic 14px var(--serif)}.record-filter-bar{position:relative;z-index:3;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:30px;margin:23px 0 18px;padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11);border-radius:19px;background:rgba(8,8,7,.18)}.record-filter-group small{display:block;margin-bottom:7px;color:#9e968b;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.2em}.record-pills{display:flex;gap:5px}.record-pills button{border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:15px;background:transparent;color:#bcb3a7;padding:7px 11px;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.09em}.record-pills button:hover{border-color:var(--scene-line)}.record-pills button.on{background:rgba(239,229,211,.9);color:#24201b}.custom-dates{display:none;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-left:auto}.custom-dates.open{display:flex}.custom-dates input{color-scheme:dark;border:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--scene-line);background:transparent;color:#ddd3c5;padding:6px;font-size:8px}.record-layout{position:relative;z-index:2;display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 220px;gap:16px}.record-chart-card{position:relative;min-height:470px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:28px;background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,255,255,.055),rgba(255,255,255,.012));overflow:hidden;backdrop-filter:blur(11px)}.record-chart-top{position:absolute;left:25px;top:22px;z-index:3}.record-chart-top span{display:block;color:#9e968b;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.2em}.record-chart-top strong{display:block;margin-top:6px;color:#f0e6d8;font:400 31px var(--serif)}.record-chart{position:absolute;inset:58px 18px 9px;width:calc(100% - 36px);height:calc(100% - 67px);overflow:visible}.record-grid path{fill:none;stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.075);stroke-width:1;stroke-dasharray:2 9}.record-area{fill:url(#recordAreaGradient)}.record-line-shadow{fill:none;stroke:rgba(0,0,0,.28);stroke-width:8;stroke-linecap:round}.record-line{fill:none;stroke:url(#recordGradient);stroke-width:1.6;stroke-linecap:round;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(224,190,126,.25));stroke-dasharray:1500;animation:recordDraw 1.35s var(--ease) both}@keyframes recordDraw{from{stroke-dashoffset:1500}to{stroke-dashoffset:0}}.record-dot{fill:#171512;stroke:var(--scene-accent);stroke-width:2}.record-dot-halo{fill:rgba(226,193,132,.08);animation:dotBreathe 2.6s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes dotBreathe{50%{r:15;opacity:0}}.record-axis text{fill:#9c9489;font:9px var(--sans);letter-spacing:.05em}.record-empty{display:none;position:absolute;inset:0;place-items:center;color:#a9a095;font:italic 17px var(--serif)}.record-empty.open{display:grid}.record-summary{display:grid;gap:12px}.record-summary article{min-height:132px;padding:19px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:23px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.035);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}.record-summary span{color:#9e968b;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.2em}.record-summary strong{display:block;margin:8px 0 4px;color:#f1e7d8;font:400 35px var(--serif)}.record-summary small{color:#9d958a;font-size:8px;line-height:1.5}.balance-ring{position:relative;width:72px;height:72px;margin:10px 0 5px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center}.balance-ring i{position:absolute;inset:7px;border:1px dashed var(--scene-accent);border-radius:50%;animation:slowSpin 18s linear infinite}.balance-ring b{font:400 17px var(--serif);color:#ece2d3}

    /* study time breathing */
    .time-page{padding:clamp(30px,4vw,66px)}.time-layout{min-height:530px}.time-dial{filter:drop-shadow(0 28px 45px rgba(0,0,0,.26));animation:dialBreath 5s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes dialBreath{50%{transform:scale(1.018);filter:drop-shadow(0 28px 55px rgba(0,0,0,.32))}}.dial-track{stroke-width:.65}.dial-arc.today{stroke-width:1.15}.dial-arc.session{stroke-width:.85}.dial-arc.reward{stroke-width:.7}.dial-center strong{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:300;letter-spacing:-.075em;text-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(242,226,197,.12)}.time-stat strong{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:300;letter-spacing:-.045em}.time-journal{background:rgba(12,11,10,.12);border-radius:28px;padding-right:25px}.time-quote{font-weight:400}

    /* dramatic time path + skeleton watch */
    .scenes-page{padding:clamp(28px,3.4vw,56px)}.scene-header{grid-template-columns:1fr auto}.scene-heading .page-title{font-size:clamp(45px,5vw,76px);font-weight:300}.world-clocks{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;padding:13px 18px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:22px;background:rgba(10,9,8,.18)}.world-clocks div{text-align:right}.world-clocks small{display:block;color:#9c9489;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.17em}.world-clocks b{display:block;margin-top:4px;color:#efe5d6;font:300 22px var(--serif);letter-spacing:.02em}.world-clocks>i{width:1px;height:36px;background:var(--scene-line)}.scene-basis{position:relative;z-index:6;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin:20px 0 -8px;color:#aaa196;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.14em}.scene-basis>div{display:flex;gap:4px}.scene-basis button{border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:15px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:#b7aea2;padding:7px 10px;font-size:7px}.scene-basis button.on{border-color:var(--scene-line);color:#f1e6d6;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07)}#customSceneTime{display:none;color-scheme:dark;border:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--scene-line);background:transparent;color:#e6ddcf;padding:6px}#customSceneTime.open{display:block}.scene-gallery{margin-top:5px;padding:92px 12px 42px;min-height:610px;mask-image:none;overflow:visible}.scene-curve{top:4px;height:270px;min-width:1120px}.scene-curve path:first-child{stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.1);stroke-width:.8}.scene-curve path:last-child{stroke-width:1.25;stroke-dasharray:2 10;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(226,189,119,.25))}.scene-track{min-width:1120px;gap:5px;padding:155px 15px 30px;justify-content:space-between}.scene-card{--lift:0px;flex-basis:138px;border:0;border-radius:14px;padding:5px;background:rgba(7,7,6,.18);opacity:.28;filter:saturate(.7);box-shadow:none}.scene-card:nth-child(1){--lift:-48px;transform:rotate(-4deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(2){--lift:38px;transform:rotate(3deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(3){--lift:-6px;transform:rotate(-2deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(4){--lift:67px;transform:rotate(4deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(5){--lift:-27px;transform:rotate(-3deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(6){--lift:45px;transform:rotate(2deg)}.scene-card:nth-child(7){--lift:-38px;transform:rotate(4deg)}.scene-card:before{top:-58px;width:7px;height:7px}.scene-card img{height:150px;border-radius:10px}.scene-card b{font:300 17px var(--serif);color:#eee4d5}.scene-card.on{opacity:1;background:rgba(9,8,7,.24);transform:translateY(-18px) scale(1.23) rotate(0deg);border:0;box-shadow:0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.35),0 0 0 1px var(--scene-line)}.scene-card.on img{filter:brightness(.95) saturate(.92)}
    .pocket-watch.watch-orbit{position:absolute;left:50%;top:120px;z-index:8;width:108px;height:108px;margin:0;padding:0;border:0;border-radius:50%;background:transparent;color:#eadcc5;transition:left .8s var(--ease),top .8s var(--ease);filter:drop-shadow(0 14px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.45))}.watch-orbit .watch-face{position:absolute;inset:8px;width:auto;height:auto;border:1px solid rgba(232,203,146,.72);border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(10,9,8,.08) 0 19%,transparent 20% 43%,rgba(215,179,112,.08) 44% 46%,transparent 47%);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 7px rgba(255,255,255,.025),0 0 0 3px rgba(16,14,11,.38),0 0 0 4px rgba(220,183,113,.42);color:#e5d6bd}.watch-orbit .watch-loop{position:absolute;left:44px;top:-11px;width:20px;height:17px;border:1px solid rgba(232,203,146,.7);border-radius:50% 50% 20% 20%}.watch-orbit .watch-crown{position:absolute;left:48px;top:-18px;width:12px;height:7px;border:1px solid rgba(232,203,146,.65);border-radius:3px}.watch-orbit .roman-mark{position:absolute;font:300 7px var(--serif);color:#e5d6bd}.watch-orbit .r12{left:50%;top:7px;transform:translateX(-50%)}.watch-orbit .r3{right:8px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%)}.watch-orbit .r6{left:50%;bottom:6px;transform:translateX(-50%)}.watch-orbit .r9{left:8px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%)}.watch-orbit .watch-hand{left:50%;top:50%;background:var(--scene-accent);width:1px}.watch-orbit .watch-digital{bottom:22px;color:rgba(240,224,197,.64);font-size:6px}.watch-orbit:hover,.watch-orbit.touched{transform:scale(1.08);filter:drop-shadow(0 0 22px rgba(225,187,116,.25))}.watch-orbit.touched .watch-face{animation:watchChime .65s ease}@keyframes watchChime{50%{box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 7px rgba(255,255,255,.05),0 0 0 12px rgba(220,183,113,.08),0 0 35px rgba(220,183,113,.22)}}

    /* stamp memory wall */
    .album-page{padding:clamp(25px,3vw,48px);overflow:hidden}.album-head{align-items:center}.album-head .page-title{font-size:clamp(42px,4.2vw,66px)}.album-head .page-copy{max-width:620px}.album-tools{max-width:560px;justify-content:flex-end;flex-wrap:wrap}.sample-stamp,.album-info,.choose-stamp-button{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.13);background:rgba(8,8,7,.18)}.choose-stamp-button{min-height:44px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:23px;color:#e9dfd1;padding:0 13px;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.1em}.choose-stamp-button b{display:inline-grid;place-items:center;margin-left:8px;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--scene-accent);color:#181511}.choose-stamp-button:disabled{opacity:.35}.album-wall{position:relative;z-index:2;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(14,minmax(46px,1fr));grid-auto-rows:69px;gap:2px 3px;align-items:center;min-height:620px;margin:17px -4px 0;padding:24px 12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);overflow:hidden;background:radial-gradient(circle at 45% 47%,rgba(255,255,255,.035),transparent 55%)}.album-wall .stamp-slot{position:relative;min-width:0;animation:stampFloat calc(5s + var(--float,0s)) ease-in-out infinite alternate;animation-delay:calc(var(--delay,0s) * -1);transform:translate(var(--dx,0),var(--dy,0)) rotate(var(--rot,0deg));z-index:1}.album-wall .stamp-slot:hover{z-index:20}.album-wall .stamp-card{width:var(--sw,62px)!important;height:var(--sh,78px)!important;max-width:none;max-height:none;padding:4px;border:0;background:rgba(234,222,195,.94);filter:drop-shadow(0 6px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.28));box-shadow:none}.album-wall .stamp-card img{object-fit:cover}.album-wall .stamp-caption{display:none}.album-wall .stamp-card.locked{background:rgba(211,202,182,.2)}.album-wall .stamp-card.locked img{filter:grayscale(1) blur(3px) brightness(.65);opacity:.22}.album-wall .stamp-card.locked:after{content:"";background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(227,215,190,.11),rgba(20,18,16,.08))}.album-wall .stamp-card:not(.locked):hover{transform:scale(1.32) rotate(-2deg);filter:drop-shadow(0 18px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.42))}.album-wall.demo .stamp-card.locked img{filter:grayscale(.25) blur(0) brightness(.92);opacity:.88}.album-wall.demo .stamp-card.locked:after{display:none}.album-wall.demo .stamp-card.locked{background:rgba(234,222,195,.92)}@keyframes stampFloat{from{translate:-2px -3px}to{translate:3px 4px}}.wall-preview-label{position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;z-index:12;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.9);padding:10px 17px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:20px;background:rgba(9,8,7,.76);color:#e8ddcc;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.18em;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:.35s}.wall-preview-label.open{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)}
    .choice-card{width:min(760px,94vw);padding:32px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:30px;background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(28,25,21,.96),rgba(13,12,10,.96));color:#eee4d6;box-shadow:0 35px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.58)}.choice-card header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:start}.choice-card h2{margin:7px 0 0;font:300 38px var(--serif)}.choice-card>p{color:#b9b0a4;font-size:11px;line-height:1.7}.choice-card>small{display:block;margin-top:17px;text-align:center;color:#8f877d;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.1em}.stamp-choices{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:18px;margin-top:24px}.stamp-choice{min-height:260px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:24px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.035);color:#ddd3c4;padding:22px 12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center}.stamp-choice img{max-width:112px;max-height:145px;filter:grayscale(1) blur(4px) brightness(.62);opacity:.42;transition:.45s}.stamp-choice b{margin-top:17px;font:300 17px var(--serif)}.stamp-choice small{margin-top:5px;color:#8f877c;font-size:7px}.stamp-choice:hover{border-color:var(--scene-line);transform:translateY(-5px)}.stamp-choice:hover img{filter:grayscale(.8) blur(2px) brightness(.75);opacity:.65}

    /* balanced stamp detail + true immersive inspection */
    .preview-card{width:min(1040px,94vw);min-height:0;max-height:88vh;grid-template-columns:minmax(360px,1.08fr) minmax(320px,.92fr);border-color:var(--scene-line);background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(24,22,19,.97),rgba(12,11,10,.96));overflow:auto}.preview-image{min-height:620px;padding:30px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 48%,rgba(239,220,181,.16),transparent 43%),rgba(255,255,255,.02)}.preview-image img{max-width:92%;max-height:570px}.preview-copy{padding:42px 38px;justify-content:flex-start}.preview-copy h3{font-weight:300;font-size:clamp(34px,4vw,57px);margin:11px 0 12px}.preview-copy p{font-size:12px;line-height:1.75;margin:12px 0}.preview-meta{margin:4px 0 8px}.preview-meta span{border:0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);border-radius:0;padding:6px 3px}.stamp-learning-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px}.immersive-button,.word-study-button{width:max-content;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:19px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);color:#e6dccd;padding:10px 14px;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.1em}.immersive-button{background:var(--paper);color:#302a22}.stamp-words{display:none;margin-top:13px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)}.stamp-words.open{display:grid;gap:7px}.word-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07)}.word-row b{font:300 15px var(--serif);color:#eadfce}.word-row span{color:#a9a095;font-size:9px}.immersive{background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 45%,rgba(58,49,38,.97),#12100e 57%,#060605 100%)}.immersive-stage{width:min(94vw,1160px);height:min(88vh,820px)}.immersive-stage>img{max-width:90%;max-height:88%;filter:drop-shadow(0 35px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.55))}.magnifier{width:112px;height:112px;border-width:2px}.magnifier:after{right:-31px;bottom:-10px;width:48px;height:9px}.immersive-note{max-width:320px}

    /* private mind-clearing ritual */
    .focus-ritual{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:210;background:rgba(4,4,4,.97);color:#eee5d8;place-items:center;overflow:hidden}.focus-ritual.open{display:grid}.focus-close{position:absolute;right:24px;top:20px;z-index:10;width:42px;height:42px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);border-radius:50%;background:transparent;color:#d9d0c4;font-size:20px}.focus-write,.focus-release,.focus-countdown{width:min(760px,90vw);text-align:center}.focus-write h2,.focus-release h2{margin:13px auto 8px;font:300 clamp(36px,5vw,65px)/1 var(--serif);letter-spacing:-.04em}.focus-write p,.focus-release p{max-width:570px;margin:13px auto;color:#aaa196;font-size:11px;line-height:1.7}.focus-envelope{position:relative;width:75px;height:53px;margin:0 auto 24px;border:1px solid var(--scene-accent);border-radius:5px}.focus-envelope:before,.focus-envelope:after{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;right:0;top:0;height:1px;background:var(--scene-accent);transform-origin:left}.focus-envelope:before{transform:rotate(35deg);width:45px}.focus-envelope:after{left:auto;right:0;transform:rotate(-35deg);transform-origin:right;width:45px}.focus-timer{margin:20px 0 8px;font:300 25px var(--serif);color:#d9c8aa;letter-spacing:.08em}.focus-write textarea{width:100%;height:230px;resize:none;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);border-radius:25px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.025);color:#eee5d8;padding:22px;font:300 19px/1.65 var(--serif);caret-color:var(--scene-accent)}.focus-actions{margin-top:14px}.focus-actions button,.focus-release button{border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);color:#e8ddce;padding:12px 20px;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.16em}.focus-release{display:none}.focus-release.open{display:block}.breath-orbit{position:relative;width:126px;height:126px;margin:24px auto;display:grid;place-items:center;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);border-radius:50%;color:#ded3c4;font:italic 14px var(--serif)}.breath-orbit i{position:absolute;inset:13px;border:1px solid var(--scene-accent);border-radius:50%;animation:breathCircle 5s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes breathCircle{50%{transform:scale(1.35);opacity:.18}}.particle-field{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none}.thought-particle{position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;width:3px;height:3px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--scene-accent);animation:thoughtAway 1.8s var(--ease) forwards}@keyframes thoughtAway{to{transform:translate(var(--px),var(--py)) scale(0);opacity:0}}.focus-countdown{display:none}.focus-countdown.open{display:grid;place-items:center}.focus-countdown small{color:#9d958a;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.25em}.focus-countdown strong{display:block;margin-top:25px;font:200 min(34vw,320px)/.8 var(--serif);color:#f0e7da;animation:countPulse .95s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes countPulse{50%{transform:scale(.88);opacity:.45}}

    /* V8 · time constellation */
    .scenes-page{padding:clamp(24px,3vw,44px);overflow:hidden}.scene-header{position:relative;z-index:4}.scene-heading .page-title{font-size:clamp(39px,4.4vw,67px)}
    .scene-basis{margin:15px 0 10px}.scene-basis button{padding:8px 13px;transition:transform .42s var(--ease),background .42s,border-color .42s}.scene-basis button:hover{transform:translateY(-2px) scale(1.035)}
    .scene-gallery{position:relative;margin-top:8px;padding:0;min-height:610px;height:min(65vh,650px);overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.085);border-radius:34px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 49%,rgba(255,255,255,.07),transparent 19%),linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(8,8,7,.075),rgba(255,255,255,.012));backdrop-filter:blur(5px);mask-image:none}
    .scene-gallery:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:10% 31%;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.075);border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 0 0 30px rgba(255,255,255,.012),0 0 0 74px rgba(255,255,255,.008);animation:cosmosBreathe 5.5s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes cosmosBreathe{50%{transform:scale(1.035);border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 28%,transparent);box-shadow:0 0 0 35px rgba(255,255,255,.009),0 0 0 80px rgba(255,255,255,.004)}}
    .scene-curve{position:absolute;inset:0;min-width:0;width:100%;height:100%;opacity:.72}.scene-curve path:first-child{stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.1);stroke-width:.7}.scene-curve path:last-child{stroke:url(#sceneLine);stroke-width:1;stroke-dasharray:36 14;animation:orbitGlide 18s linear infinite;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 42%,transparent))}@keyframes orbitGlide{to{stroke-dashoffset:-300}}
    .pocket-watch.watch-orbit{left:50%!important;top:50%!important;width:154px;height:154px;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);filter:drop-shadow(0 24px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.48));transition:transform .7s var(--ease),filter .7s ease}.pocket-watch.watch-orbit:hover,.pocket-watch.watch-orbit.touched{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.075)}
    .watch-orbit .watch-face{inset:10px;border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 70%,rgba(255,255,255,.34));background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,255,255,.025) 0 17%,transparent 18% 40%,color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 10%,transparent) 41% 43%,transparent 44%);box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,.02),inset 0 0 25px rgba(255,255,255,.025),0 0 0 4px rgba(12,11,10,.28),0 0 0 5px color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 36%,transparent)}
    .watch-orbit .watch-loop{left:64px;top:-14px;width:25px;height:21px}.watch-orbit .watch-crown{left:70px;top:-24px;width:14px;height:10px}.watch-orbit .watch-digital{bottom:31px;font:italic 8px var(--serif)}
    .scene-track{position:absolute;inset:0;min-width:0;display:block;padding:0}.scene-card{--rot:0deg;--w:170px;position:absolute;display:block;width:var(--w);flex:none;margin:0;padding:6px 6px 11px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:22px;background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(8,8,7,.28),rgba(255,255,255,.025));opacity:.42;filter:saturate(.72) brightness(.82);transform:rotate(var(--rot));animation:cardArrival .85s var(--ease) both,sceneCardBreath 5.5s ease-in-out infinite;animation-delay:calc(var(--i) * 75ms),calc(var(--i) * -.7s);box-shadow:0 18px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.16);backdrop-filter:blur(7px)}
    @keyframes sceneCardBreath{50%{translate:0 -5px;box-shadow:0 25px 46px rgba(0,0,0,.24),0 0 24px rgba(255,255,255,.018)}}
    .scene-card:before{top:50%;left:auto;right:-17px;width:6px;height:6px;box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(255,255,255,.025),0 0 16px var(--scene-accent)}.scene-card:nth-child(n+5):before{right:auto;left:-17px}
    .scene-card img{width:100%;height:var(--ih,142px);border-radius:16px;filter:brightness(.7) saturate(.72)}.scene-card small{margin:8px 5px 1px}.scene-card b{margin-left:5px;font-size:20px;font-weight:300}
    .scene-card:nth-child(1){--w:190px;--ih:156px;--rot:-3deg;left:2.5%;top:27%}.scene-card:nth-child(2){--w:150px;--ih:112px;--rot:2.5deg;left:18%;top:4.5%}.scene-card:nth-child(3){--w:178px;--ih:143px;--rot:-1.8deg;left:20.5%;bottom:4.5%}.scene-card:nth-child(4){--w:146px;--ih:105px;--rot:2deg;left:50%;top:3.5%;transform:translateX(-50%) rotate(var(--rot))}.scene-card:nth-child(5){--w:178px;--ih:143px;--rot:2.2deg;right:20.5%;bottom:4.5%}.scene-card:nth-child(6){--w:150px;--ih:112px;--rot:-2.5deg;right:18%;top:4.5%}.scene-card:nth-child(7){--w:190px;--ih:156px;--rot:3deg;right:2.5%;top:27%}
    .scene-card:hover{opacity:.82;filter:none;transform:rotate(0) scale(1.045);z-index:10}.scene-card:nth-child(4):hover{transform:translateX(-50%) rotate(0) scale(1.045)}
    .scene-card.on{opacity:1;filter:none;background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(12,11,9,.38),rgba(255,255,255,.045));border-color:var(--scene-accent);transform:rotate(0) scale(1.12);box-shadow:0 28px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.38),0 0 0 5px color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 8%,transparent);z-index:12}.scene-card:nth-child(4).on{transform:translateX(-50%) rotate(0) scale(1.12)}
    .scene-card.on:before{background:var(--scene-accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 8px color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 12%,transparent),0 0 25px var(--scene-accent)}
    .scene-mode-card{width:min(520px,92vw);padding:30px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:28px;background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(21,19,16,.92),rgba(12,11,10,.88));color:#eee4d6;box-shadow:0 30px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.45)}.scene-mode-card h3{margin:19px 0 8px;font:400 32px/1.05 var(--serif)}.scene-mode-card p{color:#aaa095;font-size:10px;line-height:1.7}.scene-mode-card .modal-actions button{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.13);color:#d9d0c4;background:rgba(255,255,255,.035)}.scene-mode-card .modal-actions .primary{background:var(--scene-accent);color:#171410}

    /* V8 · memory wall, arranged like breathing fragments rather than shelves */
    .album-wall{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(30,minmax(0,1fr))!important;grid-auto-rows:22px;grid-auto-flow:dense;align-items:stretch;gap:2px 3px;min-height:640px;padding:28px 18px 35px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 47% 43%,rgba(255,255,255,.055),transparent 46%),linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(7,7,6,.08),rgba(255,255,255,.008));border-radius:30px}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot{grid-column:span var(--cs,2);grid-row:span var(--rs,4);width:auto;height:auto;place-items:stretch;transform:translate(var(--dx,0),var(--dy,0)) rotate(var(--rot,0deg));animation:stampFloat calc(5s + var(--float,0s)) ease-in-out infinite alternate;animation-delay:calc(var(--delay,0s) * -1)}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(9n+2),.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(13n+1){z-index:3}.album-wall .stamp-card{width:100%!important;height:100%!important;min-width:0;min-height:0;padding:3px}.album-wall .stamp-card img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}.album-wall .stamp-card:not(.locked):hover{transform:scale(1.22) rotate(-1.5deg)}
    @media(max-width:1100px){.album-wall{grid-template-columns:repeat(22,minmax(0,1fr))!important}}
    @media(max-width:720px){.album-wall{grid-template-columns:repeat(14,minmax(0,1fr))!important;grid-auto-rows:20px}}

    @media(max-width:1100px){.player-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr}.player-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;min-height:0}.player-side .control-row{grid-column:2;grid-row:1/4}.player-side .save-clip{margin:0}.record-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}.record-summary{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}.scene-gallery{overflow:hidden}.scene-basis{flex-wrap:wrap}.scene-card:nth-child(1),.scene-card:nth-child(7){--w:165px}.scene-card:nth-child(2),.scene-card:nth-child(6){--w:135px}.scene-card:nth-child(3),.scene-card:nth-child(5){--w:155px}}
    @media(max-width:720px){.fountain-ritual,.ripple-ritual{height:480px}.fountain-words,.ripple-motto{top:80px;font-size:24px}.player-page{padding:12px}.player-side{display:flex}.stage{max-height:none}.segment-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.transport{grid-column:1/3;grid-row:2}.transcript-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.record-head{display:block}.record-range-label{margin-top:15px;width:max-content}.record-filter-bar{align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column;gap:13px}.custom-dates{margin-left:0}.record-summary{grid-template-columns:1fr}.world-clocks{margin-top:15px}.scene-header{grid-template-columns:1fr}.scene-basis>div{overflow-x:auto;max-width:100%}.album-tools{justify-content:flex-start}.album-wall{grid-template-columns:repeat(6,minmax(43px,1fr));grid-auto-rows:62px}.stamp-choices{grid-template-columns:1fr}.preview-card{grid-template-columns:1fr}.preview-image{min-height:390px}.preview-copy{padding:30px 24px}.focus-write textarea{height:200px}.source-credit{display:none}}

    /* V9 · confirmed refinement pass */
    :root{--wall-blur:3px;--wall-clarity:1}
    .backdrop{filter:blur(var(--wall-blur)) saturate(calc(.9 * var(--wall-clarity))) contrast(1.03) brightness(.92);transform:scale(calc(1 + var(--wall-blur)/200))!important}
    .glass-page{background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(17,16,14,.22),rgba(10,10,9,.08))!important;backdrop-filter:blur(10px) saturate(.96)!important}
    input:focus,textarea:focus,select:focus,button:focus-visible{outline:none!important;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--scene-accent),0 0 0 5px color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 12%,transparent)!important;border-color:var(--scene-accent)!important}

    /* home: time-aware greeting + balanced water ritual */
    .home-content{position:relative;margin-top:0}.home-greeting{position:absolute;z-index:7;left:50%;top:-2px;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:13px;white-space:nowrap;color:rgba(245,236,221,.9);text-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.45)}
    .home-greeting span{font:italic 400 clamp(17px,1.7vw,23px)/1 var(--serif);letter-spacing:.02em}.home-greeting small{font:400 8px/1 var(--sans);letter-spacing:.2em;color:rgba(235,225,209,.58)}
    .ripple-motto{top:116px;font-size:clamp(25px,2.5vw,38px)}.ripple-field,.ripple-import{top:59%}.ripple-caption{top:calc(59% + 88px)}.ripple-import{width:82px;height:82px}.ripple-field{width:300px;height:190px}

    /* glossy silk and tiny gelato cone */
    .lace-ribbon{height:58px;border:0;opacity:.62;filter:drop-shadow(0 9px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.26));background:linear-gradient(96deg,transparent 0 5%,rgba(255,255,255,.09) 13%,rgba(244,244,240,.48) 29%,rgba(255,255,255,.13) 47%,rgba(235,234,229,.42) 67%,rgba(255,255,255,.07) 83%,transparent 96%);clip-path:polygon(0 40%,10% 23%,24% 37%,36% 11%,51% 43%,66% 20%,81% 42%,100% 17%,100% 72%,82% 56%,69% 81%,53% 54%,37% 79%,23% 52%,8% 71%,0 58%);animation:silkDrift 11s ease-in-out infinite alternate}
    .lace-ribbon:before{inset:10px 0!important;width:auto!important;height:auto!important;border:0!important;border-radius:0!important;transform:none!important;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.42),transparent 42%,rgba(8,8,8,.16));mix-blend-mode:screen}.lace-ribbon:after{display:none}@keyframes silkDrift{to{transform:translate3d(18px,-7px,0) rotate(calc(var(--r) + 1deg));opacity:.77}}
    .stage-center{z-index:8}.timeline-block .segment-length{margin-top:15px}.gelato-cursor{top:6px;transform:translateX(-50%) scale(.62)}.gelato-cursor i{width:17px;height:12px;border-radius:58% 58% 45% 45%;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#e9d0b1,#cf7d72);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.42)}.gelato-cursor b{margin:-1px auto;border-left:5px solid transparent;border-right:5px solid transparent;border-top:12px solid #c99d62}.player-page.audio-mode .stage-center{left:auto;right:24px;bottom:24px;top:auto;transform:none}

    /* mandatory mind clearing */
    .focus-ritual.required .focus-close{display:none}.focus-requirement{display:block;min-height:18px;margin:7px 0;color:var(--scene-accent);font:italic 11px var(--serif)}.focus-ritual.required .focus-write:after{content:"PRIMA DI ASCOLTARE · BEFORE LISTENING";display:block;margin-top:18px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.28);font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.22em}

    /* progress resume capsule */
    .record-head-side{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:10px}.record-resume{display:none;align-items:center;gap:12px;width:290px;min-height:64px;padding:10px 13px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:20px;background:rgba(8,8,7,.16);color:#e8ddcf;text-align:left;backdrop-filter:blur(13px)}.record-resume.open{display:flex}.record-resume>i{display:grid;place-items:center;width:35px;height:35px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:50%;font:italic 15px var(--serif)}.record-resume span{display:grid;gap:2px;min-width:0}.record-resume small{color:var(--scene-accent);font-size:6px;letter-spacing:.18em}.record-resume b{overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font:italic 15px var(--serif)}.record-resume em{color:#978f84;font:normal 7px var(--sans)}

    /* time: three Italian water rings and unlockable windows */
    .time-layout{min-height:460px}.time-dial:before,.time-dial:after,.time-dial .roman{display:none}.dial-track{stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.06);stroke-width:.55}.dial-arc{stroke-dasharray:16 7;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 9px rgba(255,255,255,.08));transform-origin:center}.dial-arc.today{stroke:url(#todayWave);stroke-width:1.35;animation:ringWaterA 7s ease-in-out infinite}.dial-arc.session{stroke:url(#sessionWave);stroke-width:1.05;animation:ringWaterB 9s ease-in-out infinite}.dial-arc.reward{stroke:url(#rewardWave);stroke-width:.9;animation:ringWaterC 11s ease-in-out infinite}.dial-center strong,.time-stat strong{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:200;letter-spacing:-.065em}@keyframes ringWaterA{50%{opacity:.48;transform:scale(.985)}}@keyframes ringWaterB{50%{opacity:.6;transform:scale(1.012)}}@keyframes ringWaterC{50%{opacity:.42;transform:scale(.975)}}
    .window-rewards{margin-top:8px;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)}.window-rewards header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#9c9386;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.18em}.window-rewards header b{font-weight:400;color:var(--scene-accent)}.window-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:12px;margin-top:12px}.reward-window{position:relative;height:115px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11);border-radius:36px 36px 10px 10px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(7,7,6,.4),rgba(10,9,8,.18));overflow:hidden;opacity:.34;transition:.75s var(--ease)}.reward-window:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:28px 28px 6px 6px;background:linear-gradient(150deg,rgba(121,150,168,.06),rgba(212,166,103,.035))}.reward-window:after{content:"";position:absolute;left:50%;top:8px;bottom:8px;width:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.09)}.reward-window.unlocked{opacity:1;border-color:var(--scene-line);box-shadow:inset 0 0 28px color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 9%,transparent),0 0 26px color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 8%,transparent)}.reward-window.unlocked:before{background:linear-gradient(160deg,rgba(120,159,181,.13),rgba(237,188,104,.14) 72%,rgba(220,139,92,.1));animation:windowGlow 4s ease-in-out infinite}.reward-window span{position:absolute;z-index:2;left:0;right:0;bottom:10px;text-align:center;color:#c7bdaf;font:italic 10px var(--serif)}.reward-window:nth-child(2){border-radius:48% 48% 8px 8px}.reward-window:nth-child(3):after{left:33%;box-shadow:23px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.09)}.reward-window:nth-child(4){border-radius:8px 8px 42px 42px}.reward-window:nth-child(5){clip-path:polygon(8% 0,92% 0,100% 12%,100% 100%,0 100%,0 12%)}@keyframes windowGlow{50%{filter:brightness(1.25);opacity:.7}}

    /* 7C scene controls */
    .scene-header{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;align-items:start}.scene-header-tools{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;gap:10px;min-width:365px}.world-clocks{margin:0;min-width:220px;padding:9px 14px;background:rgba(10,9,8,.13)}.world-clocks b{font:300 20px var(--serif)}.scene-visual-button{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;height:48px;padding:0 14px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:24px;background:rgba(11,10,9,.18);color:#ded4c5;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.17em}.scene-visual-button i{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--scene-accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 5px color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 9%,transparent);animation:scenePulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.scene-visual-panel{position:absolute;right:0;top:58px;z-index:30;display:grid;grid-template-columns:44px auto minmax(150px,1fr) auto;align-items:center;gap:12px;width:min(650px,62vw);padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--scene-line);border-radius:25px;background:linear-gradient(105deg,rgba(13,12,10,.9),rgba(28,24,19,.75));backdrop-filter:blur(22px);box-shadow:0 22px 65px rgba(0,0,0,.34);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transform:translateX(18px) scale(.98);transition:.55s var(--ease)}.scene-visual-panel.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto;transform:none}.scene-preview-dot{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background-image:var(--scene-image);background-size:cover;background-position:center;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.2)}.scene-quality{display:flex;padding:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.045);border-radius:17px}.scene-quality button{border:0;border-radius:14px;background:transparent;color:#9d9488;padding:7px 9px;font-size:6px}.scene-quality button.on{background:rgba(237,227,210,.9);color:#26221d}.scene-visual-panel label{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;align-items:center;gap:8px;color:#aaa095;font-size:6px;letter-spacing:.12em}.scene-visual-panel input[type=range]{accent-color:var(--scene-accent)}.custom-wallpaper{height:31px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.035);color:#d9cfc0;padding:0 11px;font-size:6px}.scene-gallery{background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 53%,rgba(227,195,135,.04),transparent 27%),rgba(5,5,4,.04);backdrop-filter:blur(2px)}.scene-card{opacity:.3;filter:saturate(.62) brightness(.7)}.scene-card.on{opacity:1;filter:none;transform:translateY(-18px) scale(1.18) rotate(0);box-shadow:0 28px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.38),0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb,var(--scene-accent) 8%,transparent)}

    /* stamp wall: three atmospheric modes, depth and real close control */
    .stamp-style-control{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;height:42px;padding:0 11px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);border-radius:22px;background:rgba(8,8,7,.18);color:#9e9589}.stamp-style-control>span{font-size:6px;letter-spacing:.16em}.stamp-style-control select{border:0;background:transparent;color:#e2d8c9;font:italic 11px var(--serif);min-width:132px}.wall-preview-close{display:none!important}.album-page.previewing .wall-preview-close{display:inline-flex!important}.album-page.previewing #fullWallBtn{display:none}.album-wall{grid-template-columns:repeat(26,minmax(0,1fr))!important;grid-auto-rows:28px;gap:8px 9px;min-height:680px;max-height:66vh;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;padding:38px 28px 80px;perspective:900px;mask-image:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent 0,#000 5%,#000 94%,transparent 100%)}.album-wall .stamp-slot{grid-column:span var(--cs,3);grid-row:span var(--rs,5);transform:translate3d(var(--dx,0),var(--dy,0),var(--z,0px)) rotate(var(--rot,0deg));transform-style:preserve-3d}.album-wall .stamp-card{padding:3px;background:rgba(233,221,196,.92);clip-path:polygon(5% 0,10% 3%,15% 0,20% 3%,25% 0,30% 3%,35% 0,40% 3%,45% 0,50% 3%,55% 0,60% 3%,65% 0,70% 3%,75% 0,80% 3%,85% 0,90% 3%,95% 0,100% 5%,97% 10%,100% 15%,97% 20%,100% 25%,97% 30%,100% 35%,97% 40%,100% 45%,97% 50%,100% 55%,97% 60%,100% 65%,97% 70%,100% 75%,97% 80%,100% 85%,97% 90%,100% 95%,95% 100%,90% 97%,85% 100%,80% 97%,75% 100%,70% 97%,65% 100%,60% 97%,55% 100%,50% 97%,45% 100%,40% 97%,35% 100%,30% 97%,25% 100%,20% 97%,15% 100%,10% 97%,5% 100%,0 95%,3% 90%,0 85%,3% 80%,0 75%,3% 70%,0 65%,3% 60%,0 55%,3% 50%,0 45%,3% 40%,0 35%,3% 30%,0 25%,3% 20%,0 15%,3% 10%,0 5%)}.album-wall.style-fog .stamp-card.locked{filter:grayscale(.85) blur(.8px) brightness(.72);opacity:.36}.album-wall.style-darkroom{background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 43%,rgba(125,36,30,.1),transparent 40%),rgba(4,4,4,.1)}.album-wall.style-darkroom .stamp-card.locked{filter:sepia(1) saturate(.42) contrast(1.15) brightness(.42);opacity:.48}.album-wall.style-tissue .stamp-card:after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:-2px;background:linear-gradient(115deg,rgba(241,235,222,.72),rgba(202,195,181,.4));box-shadow:inset 0 0 16px rgba(255,255,255,.18);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);transform-origin:10% 10%;transition:transform .9s var(--ease),opacity .65s;opacity:.88}.album-wall.style-tissue .stamp-card:not(.locked):after{opacity:.22;backdrop-filter:blur(.6px)}.album-wall.style-tissue .stamp-card.revealing:after{transform:translate3d(-88%,-25%,40px) rotate(-18deg);opacity:0}.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(7n+1){--z:34px}.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(9n+2){--z:-26px}.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(11n+4){--z:18px}.preview-meta a{color:var(--scene-accent);text-decoration:none}.immersive-button{display:none}.stamp-words{max-height:310px;overflow:auto;padding-right:5px}.word-list-head{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:2;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding:4px 0 8px;background:rgba(18,16,14,.96)}.word-memory-toggle{border:0;background:transparent;color:var(--scene-accent);font:italic 10px var(--serif)}.word-row{grid-template-columns:1.15fr 1fr auto;align-items:center}.word-row b small{display:block;margin-top:3px;color:#8f877d;font:400 7px var(--sans)}.word-audio{width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.035);color:#e3d7c6}.word-hint{display:none!important;grid-column:1/-1;color:#bcae9d!important;font:italic 10px var(--serif)!important}.stamp-words.show-memory .word-hint{display:block!important}

    @media(max-width:1100px){.record-head-side{align-items:flex-start}.time-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}.window-row{overflow-x:auto;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(105px,1fr))}.scene-header-tools{min-width:0}.scene-visual-panel{width:min(640px,88vw)}.album-wall{grid-template-columns:repeat(20,minmax(0,1fr))!important}}
    @media(max-width:720px){.home-greeting{top:18px}.ripple-motto{top:29%}.ripple-field,.ripple-import{top:60%}.ripple-caption{top:calc(60% + 77px)}.record-resume{width:100%}.scene-header-tools{margin-top:14px}.scene-visual-panel{right:0;top:62px;grid-template-columns:38px 1fr}.scene-visual-panel label,.scene-visual-panel .custom-wallpaper{grid-column:1/3}.album-wall{grid-template-columns:repeat(12,minmax(0,1fr))!important}.stamp-style-control{width:100%}}

    /* V10 · visual-contract repair: 7C scenes, Palazzo windows, spatial stamp archive */
    body[data-view="album"] .topbar{display:none}
    body[data-view="album"] .app{max-width:none;padding:0}
    body[data-view="album"] .album-page{margin:0;min-height:100vh;border:0;border-radius:0;padding:26px clamp(26px,5vw,86px) 90px;overflow:visible;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(10,9,8,.72),rgba(18,15,12,.32) 48%,rgba(8,8,7,.65))!important;backdrop-filter:blur(5px) saturate(.82)!important}
    .album-collection-bar{position:relative;z-index:20;display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px auto auto auto 1fr auto;align-items:center;gap:8px;height:58px;padding:0 14px;border:1px solid rgba(217,183,116,.24);border-radius:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(14,13,11,.7),rgba(29,25,20,.36));box-shadow:0 18px 55px rgba(0,0,0,.2);backdrop-filter:blur(18px)}
    .collection-mark{display:grid;place-items:center;width:36px;height:36px;border-right:1px solid rgba(217,183,116,.18);color:#cdb079;font:300 22px var(--serif)}
    .album-tab,.album-exit{height:40px;border:0;background:transparent;color:#978d7f;padding:0 16px;font:500 8px var(--sans);letter-spacing:.17em;transition:.42s var(--ease)}
    .album-tab:hover,.album-tab.active{color:#ddc18a;text-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(222,184,112,.22)}.album-tab.active{border-bottom:1px solid #c9a668}
    .album-exit{grid-column:6;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;color:#c7b28d}.album-exit i{display:grid;place-items:center;width:32px;height:32px;border:1px solid rgba(219,181,105,.42);border-radius:50%;font:300 19px var(--serif)}.album-exit:hover i{transform:rotate(90deg);box-shadow:0 0 22px rgba(218,178,101,.17)}
    body[data-view="album"] .album-head{position:relative;z-index:5;display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(330px,.8fr) minmax(460px,1.2fr);align-items:end;gap:40px;margin:34px 0 2px;padding:0 28px}
    body[data-view="album"] .album-head .page-title{font-size:clamp(42px,4.2vw,68px);font-weight:300;letter-spacing:-.045em}
    body[data-view="album"] .album-head .page-copy{max-width:540px;color:#b5aa9c}
    body[data-view="album"] .album-tools{justify-self:end;max-width:680px;gap:8px;align-items:center}
    body[data-view="album"] .stamp-style-control,body[data-view="album"] .sample-stamp,body[data-view="album"] .choose-stamp-button,body[data-view="album"] .album-info{border-color:rgba(216,181,111,.22);background:rgba(12,11,9,.3);backdrop-filter:blur(14px)}
    .album-wall{position:relative!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(20,minmax(0,1fr))!important;grid-auto-rows:30px!important;grid-auto-flow:dense!important;align-items:stretch!important;gap:8px 11px!important;min-height:2150px!important;max-height:none!important;margin:16px 0 0!important;padding:80px 5vw 130px!important;border:1px solid rgba(216,181,111,.16)!important;border-radius:2px!important;overflow:visible!important;perspective:1150px!important;mask-image:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent 0,#000 3%,#000 97%,transparent 100%)!important;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 17%,rgba(217,181,110,.08),transparent 24%),radial-gradient(circle at 23% 42%,rgba(255,255,255,.025),transparent 21%),linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(9,8,7,.1),rgba(21,17,13,.12))!important}
    .album-wall:before{content:"";position:absolute;z-index:0;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(rgba(8,7,6,.44),rgba(8,7,6,.67)),var(--scene-image);background-size:cover;background-position:center;filter:saturate(.5) sepia(.15);opacity:.22;pointer-events:none}
    .album-wall:after{content:"SCORRI";position:absolute;z-index:15;right:18px;top:100px;bottom:100px;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(217,181,110,.68),transparent);color:#c9ab73;font:500 6px var(--sans);letter-spacing:.2em;writing-mode:vertical-rl;text-orientation:mixed;padding-top:18px}
    body[data-lang="en"] .album-wall:after{content:"SCROLL"}
    body[data-lang="bi"] .album-wall:after{content:"SCORRI  ·  SCROLL"}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot{position:relative!important;z-index:2;grid-column:span var(--cs,3)!important;grid-row:span var(--rs,5)!important;display:grid!important;place-items:center!important;min-width:0!important;transform:translate3d(var(--dx,0),var(--dy,0),var(--z,0px)) rotate(var(--rot,0deg))!important;transform-style:preserve-3d!important;animation:archiveDrift calc(7s + var(--float,0s)) ease-in-out infinite alternate!important;animation-delay:calc(var(--delay,0s) * -1)!important;isolation:isolate}
    @keyframes archiveDrift{from{translate:-3px -5px}to{translate:4px 7px}}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:before{content:"";position:absolute;z-index:-1;inset:-25% -34%;background:url("assets/32c8b5134509b1d4.png") center/100% 100% no-repeat;opacity:.46;filter:sepia(.25) brightness(.78) drop-shadow(0 18px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.32));transform:rotate(calc(var(--rot,0deg) * -.45)) translateZ(-5px);transition:transform .9s var(--ease),opacity .65s,filter .65s}
    .album-wall .stamp-card{position:relative!important;z-index:2;width:66%!important;height:68%!important;min-width:38px!important;min-height:48px!important;max-width:138px!important;max-height:176px!important;padding:3px!important;border:0!important;background:rgba(225,211,182,.94)!important;clip-path:polygon(5% 0,10% 3%,15% 0,20% 3%,25% 0,30% 3%,35% 0,40% 3%,45% 0,50% 3%,55% 0,60% 3%,65% 0,70% 3%,75% 0,80% 3%,85% 0,90% 3%,95% 0,100% 5%,97% 10%,100% 15%,97% 20%,100% 25%,97% 30%,100% 35%,97% 40%,100% 45%,97% 50%,100% 55%,97% 60%,100% 65%,97% 70%,100% 75%,97% 80%,100% 85%,97% 90%,100% 95%,95% 100%,90% 97%,85% 100%,80% 97%,75% 100%,70% 97%,65% 100%,60% 97%,55% 100%,50% 97%,45% 100%,40% 97%,35% 100%,30% 97%,25% 100%,20% 97%,15% 100%,10% 97%,5% 100%,0 95%,3% 90%,0 85%,3% 80%,0 75%,3% 70%,0 65%,3% 60%,0 55%,3% 50%,0 45%,3% 40%,0 35%,3% 30%,0 25%,3% 20%,0 15%,3% 10%,0 5%)!important;box-shadow:0 18px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.28)!important;filter:sepia(.16) saturate(.72)!important;transition:transform .8s var(--ease),filter .7s,opacity .7s!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-card img{width:100%!important;height:100%!important;object-fit:cover!important}.album-wall .stamp-caption{display:none!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-card.locked{opacity:.19!important;filter:grayscale(1) blur(2.3px) sepia(.7) brightness(.76)!important}.album-wall .stamp-card.locked img{opacity:.76!important;filter:none!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:has(.stamp-card.locked):before{opacity:.27;filter:sepia(.4) brightness(.58) blur(.6px) drop-shadow(0 15px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.24))}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:has(.stamp-card:not(.locked)):before{opacity:.72}.album-wall .stamp-slot:has(.stamp-card:not(.locked)):hover{z-index:30}.album-wall .stamp-slot:has(.stamp-card:not(.locked)):hover:before{transform:translate3d(-26%,-13%,48px) rotate(-13deg) scale(1.06);opacity:.33}.album-wall .stamp-card:not(.locked):hover{transform:translateZ(90px) scale(1.38) rotate(0)!important;filter:sepia(.04) saturate(.95) brightness(1.02)!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(9n+1),.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(13n+4){--z:54px;z-index:5}.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(7n+2){--z:-45px;opacity:.64}.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(11n+6){--z:28px}.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(17n+8){--z:-75px;opacity:.48}
    .album-wall.style-fog .stamp-slot:before{opacity:.12;filter:blur(2px) sepia(.3)}.album-wall.style-fog .stamp-card.locked{opacity:.13!important;filter:grayscale(1) blur(4px) brightness(.72)!important}
    .album-wall.style-darkroom{background:radial-gradient(circle at 52% 24%,rgba(132,42,31,.15),transparent 26%),linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(7,4,3,.1),rgba(18,7,5,.13))!important}.album-wall.style-darkroom .stamp-slot:before{opacity:.26;filter:sepia(1) hue-rotate(-15deg) brightness(.48)}
    .album-wall.style-tissue .stamp-card:after{display:none!important}
    .album-wall.demo .stamp-card.locked{opacity:.96!important;filter:sepia(.12) saturate(.88) brightness(.98)!important}
    .album-wall.demo .stamp-slot:before{opacity:.25!important;filter:sepia(.22) brightness(.86) drop-shadow(0 18px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.26))!important;transform:translate3d(-18%,-12%,44px) rotate(-11deg) scale(1.03)!important}
    .album-wall.demo .stamp-slot:nth-child(even):before{transform:translate3d(19%,-8%,42px) rotate(10deg) scale(1.02)!important}
    .album-wall.demo .stamp-slot:nth-child(5n):before{transform:translate3d(-5%,18%,32px) rotate(-5deg) scale(1.05)!important}

    /* 7C: no filled eye-shape; the thread is a fine gold path behind staggered scenes */
    .scenes-page{overflow:visible!important;padding:clamp(30px,3.3vw,52px)!important}.scene-header{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 360px!important;gap:48px!important;align-items:start!important}.scene-heading{max-width:760px}.scene-heading .page-title{font-size:clamp(46px,5vw,78px)!important;font-weight:300!important;letter-spacing:-.05em}
    .scene-header-tools{position:relative!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:1fr 116px!important;grid-template-rows:auto auto!important;gap:12px!important;width:360px!important;min-width:0!important;justify-self:end!important;align-items:stretch!important}.world-clocks{grid-column:1/3!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:1fr div{text-align:center!important}.world-clocks b{font:200 25px var(--serif)!important;letter-spacing:.015em!important}.scene-visual-button{grid-column:2!important;width:116px!important;justify-content:center!important;height:43px!important;border-radius:22px!important;background:rgba(13,11,9,.19)!important}.scene-visual-panel{right:0!important;top:139px!important;width:520px!important;grid-template-columns:48px 150px 1fr!important;grid-template-rows:auto auto!important;padding:16px!important;border-radius:27px!important;background:linear-gradient(125deg,rgba(13,12,10,.87),rgba(35,28,21,.72))!important}.scene-visual-panel label{grid-column:2/4!important}.scene-visual-panel .custom-wallpaper{grid-column:2/4!important}.scene-basis{margin:13px 0 18px!important;padding-left:2px!important}.scene-gallery{position:relative!important;height:min(66vh,650px)!important;min-height:590px!important;margin-top:0!important;padding:0!important;border:1px solid rgba(213,181,116,.17)!important;border-radius:36px!important;overflow:hidden!important;background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(5,5,4,.045),rgba(28,23,18,.065))!important;backdrop-filter:blur(2px)!important}.scene-gallery:before{display:none!important}.scene-curve{position:absolute!important;inset:0!important;width:100%!important;height:100%!important;min-width:0!important;opacity:.62!important;overflow:visible!important}.scene-curve path{fill:none!important;stroke-linecap:round!important;vector-effect:non-scaling-stroke}.scene-curve path:first-child{stroke:rgba(222,190,124,.17)!important;stroke-width:.65!important}.scene-curve path:last-child{stroke:url(#sceneLine)!important;stroke-width:1.05!important;stroke-dasharray:42 18!important;animation:orbitGlide 20s linear infinite!important;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(215,177,105,.22))!important}.scene-track{z-index:4!important}.scene-card{background:linear-gradient(150deg,rgba(15,13,11,.3),rgba(255,255,255,.022))!important;border-color:rgba(225,208,178,.12)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(6px)!important}.scene-card:before{background:#c9aa6e!important}.scene-card.on{border-color:rgba(226,189,116,.8)!important;background:linear-gradient(150deg,rgba(23,19,14,.44),rgba(255,255,255,.045))!important;box-shadow:0 32px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.42),0 0 0 4px rgba(221,184,112,.07)!important}.pocket-watch.watch-orbit{z-index:9!important;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(11,10,8,.38),rgba(11,10,8,.12) 58%,transparent 60%)!important}.watch-orbit .watch-face{background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(212,181,119,.09) 0 2%,transparent 3% 36%,rgba(218,180,109,.06) 37% 40%,transparent 41%)!important}

    /* Five region-specific windows, each 30 minutes, then a new floor */
    .window-rewards{position:relative;margin-top:24px!important;padding:22px 28px 19px!important;border:1px solid rgba(214,180,112,.2)!important;border-radius:28px!important;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(12,10,8,.24),rgba(255,255,255,.018))!important;overflow:hidden}.window-rewards:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 30%,rgba(215,178,106,.06),transparent 45%);pointer-events:none}.window-rewards header{position:relative;z-index:2;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(214,180,112,.13)!important}.window-row{position:relative;z-index:2;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(130px,1fr))!important;gap:18px!important;margin-top:18px!important}.study-window{position:relative;min-height:235px;padding:0 10px 34px;text-align:center;color:#bdaa84;opacity:.42;filter:saturate(.55) brightness(.65);transition:opacity .8s,filter .8s,transform .8s var(--ease);animation:windowBreath 6s ease-in-out infinite;animation-delay:calc(var(--window-index,0) * -.8s)}.study-window:hover{opacity:.72;transform:translateY(-4px)}.study-window.unlocked{opacity:1;filter:saturate(.9) brightness(1);text-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(229,188,106,.2)}@keyframes windowBreath{50%{filter:saturate(.66) brightness(.78) drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(211,175,105,.08))}}.study-window.unlocked{animation:windowLit 4.7s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes windowLit{50%{filter:saturate(1.05) brightness(1.12) drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(232,181,86,.23))}}
    .study-window .window-kicker{display:block;color:#c1aa7d;font:500 8px var(--sans);letter-spacing:.18em}.study-window>b{display:block;margin:4px 0 0;color:#dbc18b;font:400 15px var(--serif);letter-spacing:.08em}.study-window>em{display:block;margin:3px 0 8px;color:#837864;font:400 6px var(--sans);letter-spacing:.13em;font-style:normal}.study-window>small{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:3px;color:#a99b82;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.16em}
    .study-window .window-light{position:relative;display:block;width:100%;height:155px;margin:3px auto 4px;background-image:url("data:image/png;base64,
